title: eleiosina virgata
side_effects: Eleiosina virgata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high saponin content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may also lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Additionally, improper preparation and handling of the plant can result in skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, misuse of eleiosina virgata can even cause cardiovascular issues and seizures.
